items.title: What is the dart frog toxin allegedly used to kill Alexei Navalny?
items.dek: The toxin, epibatidine, can be found in frogs in the wild in South America or manufactured in a lab.
items.body: The toxin, epibatidine, can be found in frogs in the wild in South America or manufactured in a lab.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US boards second tanker in Indian Ocean after tracking it from Caribbean
items.dek: The US accuses the Veronica III of violating a "quarantine" on oil shipments from Venezuela.
